problem_text_cn: 1392 阿米西棱镜由两块直角棱镜（折射率$n_1$）和一块等腰棱镜（折射率$n_2$）拼接而成。（1）适当选取等腰棱镜的顶角$\alpha$，可使在主截面内平行底面入射的光线不发生任何偏折地出射，而成直视棱镜，求$\alpha$；（2）直角棱镜为冕牌玻璃，等腰棱镜为火石玻璃，对光线$F(\lambda=4861\ \mathrm{\AA})$计算$\alpha$值，并算出$C(\lambda=6563\ \mathrm{\AA})$和$G(\lambda=4341\ \mathrm{\AA})$两种光线之间的色散角。
problem_text_en: 1392 An Amici prism is composed of two right-angle prisms (refractive index $n_1$) and an isosceles prism (refractive index $n_2$). (1) By appropriately selecting the apex angle $\alpha$ of the isosceles prism, light incident parallel to the base in the principal section can exit without any deviation, forming a direct-vision prism. Find $\alpha$; (2) The right-angle prisms are made of crown glass, and the isosceles prism is made of flint glass. Calculate the value of $\alpha$ for light $F(\lambda=4861\ \mathrm{\AA})$, and find the dispersion angle between light $C(\lambda=6563\ \mathrm{\AA})$ and $G(\lambda=4341\ \mathrm{\AA})$.
img_cn: 图1392_1：阿米西棱镜的光线传播分析
图1392_2：阿米西棱镜的色散角计算
img_en: Fig. 1392_1: Analysis of light propagation in an Amici prism
Fig. 1392_2: Calculation of dispersion angle in an Amici prism
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】（1）光线在等腰棱镜中平行于底面传播，在两个界面应用折射定律，结合几何关系$i_1=\frac{\pi}{2}-\frac{\alpha}{2}$、$i_2=\frac{\pi}{2}-r_1$、$r_2=\frac{\alpha}{2}$，联立求解顶角$\alpha$；（2）代入$F$光的折射率$n_1^F$、$n_2^F$计算$\alpha$，再分别计算$C$、$G$光的出射角，两者之差即为色散角。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】(1) Light propagates parallel to the base in the isosceles prism. Apply the law of refraction at the two interfaces, combine the geometric relationships $i_1=\frac{\pi}{2}-\frac{\alpha}{2}$, $i_2=\frac{\pi}{2}-r_1$, $r_2=\frac{\alpha}{2}$, and solve for the apex angle $\alpha$ simultaneously; (2) Substitute the refractive indices $n_1^F$ and $n_2^F$ of light $F$ to calculate $\alpha$, then calculate the exit angles of light $C$ and $G$ respectively, and the difference between them is the dispersion angle.
problem_answer: （1）等腰棱镜顶角$\boldsymbol{\alpha = 2\arcsin\sqrt{\dfrac{n_1^2-1}{n_2^2-1}}}$；（2）对$F$光，$\boldsymbol{\alpha=101.94^\circ}$，$C$、$G$光之间的色散角可由各自出射角之差求得
